label: Scaffold-EVVM
description: Local development environment for battle-testing EVVM services before paying testnet or mainnet gas

link.title: Scaffold-EVVM
link.description: Scaffold-EVVM is the iteration loop for anyone shipping an EVVM service. Drop a Solidity file, run one command, and get a full local EVVM stack with your service auto-deployed, an auto-generated UI, a block explorer that decodes your custom calls, and 23+ signature constructors for every protocol operation. Fail fast locally before spending a wei of testnet or mainnet gas.
